assemblies.description: This table stores information about electoral assemblies, including their names in English and Hindi, and their corresponding district identifiers, along with an indicator of whether they are currently active.

auth_assignment.description: This table stores user authorization assignments, mapping specific roles or permissions, such as "System Admin", to individual user IDs along with their assignment timestamps.

auth_item.description: This table stores authorization item details, including roles, permissions, and access rules, to manage user access and privileges within a system.

auth_item_child.description: This table stores authorization hierarchy data, mapping parent roles to their corresponding child permissions or access paths, defining the scope of access for various user roles within the system.

auth_roles.description: This table stores user role assignments, mapping individual users to specific roles such as Admin or Viewer, along with timestamps for when these roles were assigned.

auth_rule.description: This table stores authorization rules with their corresponding metadata, including creation and update timestamps, and associated binary data.

bjp_sadasyata.description: This table stores BJP party member details including name, father/husband's name, caste, age, mobile number, membership number, and geographical identifiers like mandal and gram IDs.

booth_main.description: This table stores information about voting booths, including their location, status, and creation details, likely for electoral or administrative purposes.

booth_vivaran.description: This table stores details of booth-level officials and members, including their name, position, contact information, educational background, occupation, and other personal details, likely for a political organization or party.

caste_master.description: This table stores caste information, including caste names in various languages, their respective categories, and timestamp details for creation and updates.

countries.description: This table stores country details, including their unique codes and names in both English and Hindi, along with an indicator of whether the country is active or not.

districts.description: This table stores geographical district information, including their names in both English and Hindi, along with their corresponding state identifiers and activation status.

members.description: This table stores details of members, including their personal information, positions, and contact details, in both English and Hindi, likely for an organization or political party.

menu.description: This table stores menu item details for a web application, including their names, routes, icons, and hierarchical structure, with support for multiple languages, including English and Hindi.

migration.description: This table stores database migration history, including the version and timestamp of each migration applied to the database.

notrifications.description: This table stores notification records, including the message, creator, and timestamp, likely for a system that tracks and manages alerts or updates.

party_master.description: This table stores information about different political parties, including their names, status, and timestamps for creation and updates.

ro_tbl_customer.description: This table stores customer information, including name, contact number, address, and status, belonging to specific user IDs, likely for a business or sales management system.

ro_tbl_ro_service.description: This table stores water purification Reverse Osmosis (RO) service details, including customer information, service schedules, and maintenance records.

ro_tbl_services_log.description: This table stores service log data, including service dates, next scheduled service dates, and associated user information, likely for maintenance or upkeep activities.

ro_tbl_users.description: This table stores user registration details, including name, email, contact number, password, and status, likely for an online platform or application that requires user authentication and management.

states.description: This table stores state-level geographical information, including state codes and names in both English and Hindi, along with their activation status.

tbl_block_master.description: This table stores administrative block details, including block codes and names in Hindi, along with their corresponding state and district identifiers, and status.

tbl_caste_vote_details.description: This table stores voting details for different castes, including the total number of votes cast by each caste, along with the corresponding voter and caste identifiers.

tbl_caste_voter.description: This table stores voter demographic data, including total voter counts, categorized by mandal, village, and caste, along with creation and update timestamps and user information.

tbl_caste_voter_wards.description: This table stores voter demographic data, specifically the number of voters in each ward, organized by unique identifiers and ward numbers.

tbl_category_master.description: This table stores category master data, likely for an Indian political or social context, containing various category names in Hindi and their respective status.

tbl_department.description: This table stores organizational department details, including department names, creation and update information, and status, in a multilingual format supporting English and Hindi.

tbl_designation_master.description: This table stores master data of various designations, including their names, creation and update details, and status, likely for organizational or human resource management purposes.

tbl_district_master.description: This table stores master data of districts, including their names in Hindi, contact information of officers, and status, likely for administrative or governance purposes.

tbl_jila_karyakarni_list.description: This table stores details of office bearers or members of an organization, likely a political party, including their designation, name, address, contact information, and status, with data primarily in Hindi.

tbl_mandal_karyakarni_list.description: This table stores details of mandal karyakarni members, including their name, address, contact information, educational qualification, and other relevant details, primarily in Hindi.

tbl_mandal_master.description: This table stores geographical administrative division details, specifically mandal information, including their names in Hindi, associated assembly IDs, and status, for organizational or governance purposes.

tbl_public_data.description: This table stores details of local political representatives or workers, including their personal information, party affiliation, ward assignments, and contact details, primarily in Hindi.

tbl_village_master.description: This table stores village master data, including village names, corresponding mandal names, and status, in a bilingual format, primarily in Hindi and English, for administrative or geographical information purposes.

tbl_voter_distribution.description: This table stores voter distribution details, including the number of voters and their categorization, for different villages and wards.

user.description: This table stores user registration and authentication details, including usernames, employee information, contact details, and security credentials, for an organizational management system.

ward_panchayat_details.description: This table stores details of ward panchayat members, including their personal information, educational background, occupation, and political affiliation, in a mix of English and Hindi.

ward_panchayat_management.description: This table stores management details of ward panchayats, including their category, creation and update timestamps, and associated identifiers for mandal, gram, and user, in a local government or administrative context.

wrad_no_master.description: This table stores ward number master data, including unique identifiers and creation timestamps, likely for organizational or administrative purposes.
